title: mentha micrantha
intro: Mentha micrantha is a lesser-known species of mint, also known as Small Mint or Dwarf Mint, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Mentha micrantha include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Mentha micrantha can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
